Camera is controlled aerial chase, no handheld. 00:07-00:12 the camera pushes closer from above as the creature drops through canopy haze and descends toward the jungle floor. 00:12-00:15 the creature lands hard on wet soil, compresses on impact, then begins running toward the portal.
